conflict_type: Conflicts between Phrase Constraints and Content Constraints
seed_instruction: Compose an email to an art gallery asking about upcoming exhibitions.
org_constraint: The email must include specific inquiries about the dates of the exhibitions.
new_constraint: Avoid using the phrase "dates of the exhibitions."
instruction: Compose an email to an art gallery asking about upcoming exhibitions. The email must include specific inquiries about the dates of the exhibitions. Avoid using the phrase "dates of the exhibitions."
response:
Subject: Inquiry about Upcoming Exhibitions at [Gallery Name]

Dear [Gallery Name] Team,

My name is [Your Name], and I am a great admirer of the work featured at your gallery. I am very interested in attending your upcoming shows and would love to learn more about what is on display soon.

Could you please provide me with information regarding your forthcoming exhibitions? Specifically, I would appreciate knowing when each of these shows is scheduled to begin and conclude.

If you have an online calendar or a program listing for the next few months, I would be grateful if you could point me in that direction as well.

Thank you very much for your time and assistance. I look forward to hearing from you soon and hopefully visiting the gallery.

Sincerely,

[Your Name]
[Your Phone Number or Preferred Contact Info]<turn|>
